proofPoints.headline: Demos of all social platforms
proofPoints.description: A compact showcase of what Europe’s social entrepreneurs are creating right now. Learning from one another’s products, approaches, and experiments

proofPoints.headline: Keynotes
proofPoints.description: Focused perspectives from people shaping the field. Linda Liukas (Hello Ruby), Marko Ahtisaari (Dopplr), Florian Meissner (Eyeem), Margrethe Vestager, Thomas Madsen-Mygdal. More to come.

proofPoints.headline: Overcoming shared challenges
proofPoints.description: Focused working groups tackling issues no entrepreneurs should navigate alone when taking on big challenges. A space to bring problems and build solutions together. With live support from our group of digital pioneers, early builders, and visionary investors.

proofPoints.headline: Prototyping new design principles
proofPoints.description: Hands-on prototyping of the set of design principles needed to build a new direction for social platforms.

cta.text: Request an invitation to join the first gathering

proofPoints.headline: Board programme
proofPoints.description: A structured programme to place experienced pioneers, investors, and strategic thinkers on the boards of social platform companies.

proofPoints.headline: Crafting sessions — How to
proofPoints.description: Hands-on sessions that break down practical methods and approaches by those who have done it before. How to scale to 1 million users, how to build a marketplace, how to coin your business model, how to get people to shift, how to get investments, how to build the right organisational model for your platform.

proofPoints.headline: Product design sessions
proofPoints.description: Hands-on sessions where teams co-design features, flows, and architectures. End design, explorative UI’s, spatial UI, save for later, TimeLocking.

proofPoints.headline: Designing for the Big Shift Day
proofPoints.description: Designing for a dedicated day led by the industry, mobilising people across Europe to switch to European-built social platforms. An industry-led moment to help users make the shift together.

cta.text: Sign up to our newsletter for updates

proofPoints.headline: Mobilising Europeans to shift
proofPoints.description: A coordinated awareness with all European media to share the platforms and progress emerging from the industry. Designed to build momentum and readiness ahead of the Big Shift Day.

proofPoints.headline: Top 20 case studies
proofPoints.description: A curated look at the biggest breakthroughs and cases to learn from. Making it usable for the wider industry.

proofPoints.headline: Designing the next decade to come
proofPoints.description: Defining the actions, priorities, and structures that will guide the industry forward. The starting point for long-term collaboration and commitment.

proofPoints.headline: Sunsetting Rebuild - Open sourcing the resources
proofPoints.description: A clear and intentional close to the one-year catalyst initiative. Releasing Rebuild, open sourcing all resources, so the industry can continue with its own momentum.

cta.text: Sign up to our newsletter for updates
